Registered Adapters & Providers

Available Stellar primitives and network protocol bridges currently registered in Mesa.

{{ prov.name }}

Mesa Adapter
{{ prov.health?.status || 'unknown' }}

Orchestrates SEP-24 interactive flows and SEP-6 operations. Performs outbound event callbacks and handles inbound webhooks. Suspends threads for a target interval, handling system sleep cycles. Executes custom system transactions and Soroban contracts on target networks.

Health Details
{{ JSON.stringify(prov.health || { status: 'healthy' }, null, 2) }}
